observations.title: Check authorization on every API endpoint — not just the frontend
facts: Frontend route guards are UX, not security

observations.title: Use bearer tokens in Authorization header — not query params
facts: Query param tokens leak in logs and browser history
API keys in X-Api-Key header for server-to-server

observations.title: Implement token refresh flow — don't use long-lived access tokens
facts: Rotate refresh tokens on use (detect token theft)

observations.title: Use constant-time comparison for secrets and tokens
facts: Timing attacks can leak secret values byte by byte

observations.title: Log all authentication events for audit trail
facts: Log: login success/failure, logout, token refresh, password change

observations.title: Invalidate all sessions on password change
facts: Revoke all existing tokens and sessions

observations.title: Use secure random generation for tokens and session IDs
facts: Never use Math.random() for security-sensitive values
Minimum 128 bits of entropy for tokens

observations.title: Implement CSRF protection for state-changing requests
facts: Add CSRF tokens for legacy browser support
Verify Origin header on state-changing requests

observations.title: Support API key rotation without downtime
facts: Set expiry dates for automatic rotation
